title: Ancient Sea Sponges
content: Scientists at MIT found chemical evidence that Earth first animals were ancient sea sponges. Rare molecular fingerprints match compounds in modern demosponges.

title: Quantum Computing Breakthrough
content: Researchers used a chemical tweak with tellurium to supercharge quantum computers. This helps create topological superconductors for zero resistance.

title: AI in Car Manufacturing
content: Engineers are using artificial intelligence to design hydrogen car catalysts. AI predicts how atoms move to create better fuel cells for eco-friendly mobility.

title: Space Power Generation
content: A new engine uses the freezing cold of space to generate power at night. Engineers at UC Davis built this device using a Stirling engine.

title: Titan Moon Origins
content: Saturn moon Titan may have been born in a colossal cosmic crash. New research suggests two older moons slammed together millions of years ago.

title: Healthcare and AI
content: Generative AI is being used to handle complex medical datasets. In some tests the AI outperformed human teams in building prediction models for doctors.

title: Early Dinosaur Life
content: New research suggests baby dinosaurs were like prehistoric latchkey kids. They did not stay with parents but struck out on their own very quickly.
